examples: She thanked him incoherently, as if for a favor.
The man shook his fist, as he uttered these words incoherently.
I know I express myself incoherently, but I've tried to hammer out the idea.
Panic after credit markets locked up on September when the Treasury Department incoherently let Lehman Brothers go after saving Bear Stearns.
In other video, Hassoun rambles almost incoherently about then-Chicago Mayor Richard M.
